programs.title: News Breakfast (Sydney)
programs.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Lillian Rangiah with weather.

programs.title: ABC News Mornings
programs.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programs.title: Four Corners
programs.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programs.title: Foreign Correspondent
programs.desc: In India, marriage has become a $100 billion industry with families spending more on weddings than ever. But for many the pressure to spend big is becoming a financial burden as they grapple with the true price of love.

programs.title: Back Roads
programs.desc: In the first of a two-part special, Back Roads guest presenter Rae Johnston tackles the iconic Binns Track through the red heart of Central Australia.

programs.title: ABC News At Noon
programs.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.
